Error: Missing required argument

  with aws_instance.web,
  on main.tf:12, in resource "aws_instance" "web":
  12: resource "aws_instance" "web" {

The argument "ami" is required, but no definition was found.

Error: Invalid value for variable

  on variables.tf:5, in variable "instance_count":
  5: variable "instance_count" {

The variable "instance_count" expected a number but got string.

Warning: Deprecated attribute

  on main.tf:20, in resource "aws_instance" "web":
  20:   security_groups = ["sg-12345"]

Use vpc_security_group_ids instead.
